0)\n}\n\nlemma ChapterNotCompletelyReadEquiv(chapter: (int, int), k: int)\n  requires chapter.0 <= chapter.1\n  ensures ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapter, k) <==> chapter.1 >= k\n{\n  if chapter.1 >= k {\n    assert chapter.0 <= chapter.1 <= chapter.1 && chapter.1 >= k;\n  }\n}\n\nlemma CountSplit(a: seq<(int, int)>, b: seq<(int, int)>, k: int)\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(a + b, k) == CountNotCompletelyRead(a, k) + CountNotCompletelyRead(b, k)\n  decreases |b|\n{\n  if |b| == 0 {\n    assert a + b == a;\n  } else {\n    assert (a + b)[..|a + b| - 1] == a + b[..|b| - 1];\n    assert (a + b)[|a + b| - 1] == b[|b| - 1];\n    CountSplit(a, b[..|b| - 1], k);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma AllReadCount(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].1 < k\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k) == 0\n  decreases |chapters|\n{\n  if |chapters| > 0 {\n 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].1 >= k\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k) == |chapters|\n  decreases seq<(int, int)>, i: int, j: int)\n  requires forall idx | 0 <= idx < |chapters| :: chapters[idx].0 <= chapters[idx].1\n  requires forall idx | 0 <= idx < |chapters| - 1 :: chapters[idx].1 < chapters[idx+1].0\n  requires 0 <= i <= j < |chapters|\n  ensures chapters[i].1 <= chapters[j].1\n  decreases j - i\n{\n  if i < j {\n    SortedMonotone(chapters, i, j - 1);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod NastyaBook(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int) returns (count: int)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| - 1 :: chapters[i].1 < chapters[i+1].0\n  requires k >= 1\n  ensures count == CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k)\n{\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |chapters|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |chapters|\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j < i :: chapters[j].1 < k\n  {\n    var (_, y) := chapters[i];\n    if y >= k {\n      forall j | i <= j < |chapters|\n        ensures chapters[j].1 >= k\n      {\n  count := 0;\n ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapter: (int, int), k: int)\n{\n  exists p | chapter.0 <= p <= chapter.1 :: p >= k\n}\n\nghost function CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int): int\n  decreases |chapters|\n{\n  if |chapters| == 0 then 0\n  else\n    CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters[..|chapters|-1], k)\n    + (if ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapters[|chapters|-1], k) then 1 else 0)\n}\n\nlemma ChapterNotCompletelyReadEquiv(chapter: (int, int), k: int)\n  requires chapter.0 <= chapter.1\n  ensures ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapter, k) <==> chapter.1 >= k\n{\n  if chapter.1 >= k {\n    assert ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapter, k) by {\n      var witness := chapter.1;\n      assert chapter.0 <= witness <= chapter.1;\n      assert witness >= k;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nlemma CountSplit(a: seq<(int, int)>, b: seq<(int, int)>, k: int)\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(a + b, k) == CountNotCompletelyRead(a, k) + CountNotCompletelyRead(b, k)\n  decreases |b|\n{\n  if |b| == 0 {\n    assert a + b == a;\n  } else {\n    assert (a + b)[..|a + b| - 1] == a + b[..|b| - 1];\n    assert (a + b)[|a + b| - 1] == b[|b| - 1];\n    CountSplit(a, b[..|b| - 1], k);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma AllReadCount(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].1 < k\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k) == 0\n  decreases |chapters|\n{\n  if |chapters| > 0 {\n    AllReadCount(chapters[..|chapters| - 1], k);\n    ChapterNotCompletelyReadEquiv(chapters[|chapters| - 1], k);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma AllUnreadCount(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].1 >= k\n  ensures CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k) == |chapters|\n  decreases |chapters|\n{\n  if |chapters| > 0 {\n    AllUnreadCount(chapters[..|chapters| - 1], k);\n    ChapterNotCompletelyReadEquiv(chapters[|chapters| - 1], k);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma SortedMonotone(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, i: int, j: int)\n  requires forall idx | 0 <= idx < |chapters| :: chapters[idx].0 <= chapters[idx].1\n  requires forall idx | 0 <= idx < |chapters| - 1 :: chapters[idx].1 < chapters[idx+1].0\n  requires 0 <= i <= j < |chapters|\n  ensures chapters[i].1 <= chapters[j].1\n  decreases j - i\n{\n  if i < j {\n    SortedMonotone(chapters, i, j - 1);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod NastyaBook(chapters: seq<(int, int)>, k: int) returns (count: int)\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| :: chapters[i].0 <= chapters[i].1\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |chapters| - 1 :: chapters[i].1 < chapters[i+1].0\n  requires k >= 1\n  ensures count == CountNotCompletelyRead(chapters, k)\n{\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |chapters|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |chapters|\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j < i :: chapters[j].1 < k\n  {\n    var (_, y) := chapters[i];\n    if y >= k {\n      forall j | i <= j < |chapters|\n        ensures chapters[j].1 >= k\n      {\n        SortedMonotone(chapters, i, j);\n      }\n\n      assert chapters == chapters[..i] + chapters[i..];\n      AllReadCount(chapters[..i], k);\n      AllUnreadCount(chapters[i..], k);\n      CountSplit(chapters[..i], chapters[i..], k);\n\n      count := |chapters| - i;\n      return;\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert chapters[..|chapters|] == chapters;\n  AllReadCount(chapters, k);\n  count := 0;\n  return;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":18,"oldLines":9,"newStart":18,"newLines":9,"lines":[" {"," Here's a summary:\n\n**Problem:** The `NastyaBook` method scans sorted chapter ranges left-to-right, returning `|chapters| - i` when it finds the first chapter ending at or after page `k`.\n\n**Proof strategy:** 5 helper lemmas:\n- `ChapterNotCompletelyReadEquiv` — `ChapterNotCompletelyRead(ch, k) <==> ch.1 >= k`\n- `CountSplit` — count over concatenation = sum of counts\n- `AllReadCount` — all chapters with end < k contribute 0\n- `AllUnreadCount` — all chapters with end >= k each contribute 1\n- `SortedMonotone` — sorted chapters have monotone endpoints\n\n**Loop invariant:** `0 <= i <= |chapters|` and all chapters before `i` have `chapter.1 < k`.\n\nWhen finding `y >= k` at index `i`, `SortedMonotone` proves all chapters from `i` onward also have end >= `k`, then `CountSplit` decomposes the count into 0 (prefix) + `|chapters| - i` (suffix).\n\n**Z3 note:** Required `--boogie \"/proverOpt:O:smt.mbqi=true\"` because Z3 4.15.4's model output format breaks Dafny's model parser, disabling MBQI which is needed for the triggerless existential in `ChapterNotCompletelyRead`."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":276,"cache_read_input_tokens":57009,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":276},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"22df9e6d-576d-49ed-89bd-332733967aef","uuid":"738bf2aa-c4e9-4280-a40b-7215487c23be"},{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":597054,"duration_api_ms":582711,"num_turns":23,"result":"Verified successfully.
